**Nauman Ijaz** ([Punjabi](/wiki/Punjabi_language "Punjabi language") and [Urdu](/wiki/Urdu_language "Urdu language"): نُعمان اعجاز; born 14 February 1965) is a [Pakistani](/wiki/Pakistan "Pakistan") actor. Active since 1989, he has played many roles and has been a senior actor on state television [PTV](/wiki/Pakistan_Television_Corporation "Pakistan Television Corporation").[[2]](#cite_note-awaz-2)[[3]](#cite_note-3) As of 2014, he had acted in some 175 television series.[[4]](#cite_note-Tribune2014-4)

He is the recipient of several accolades, including 10 [Lux Style Awards](/wiki/Lux_Style_Awards "Lux Style Awards"), 7 [Hum Awards](/wiki/Hum_Awards "Hum Awards") and a President's [Pride of Performance](/wiki/Pride_of_Performance "Pride of Performance") award, which was presented to him in 2012 from the [President of Pakistan](/wiki/President_of_Pakistan "President of Pakistan"), [Asif Ali Zardari](/wiki/Asif_Ali_Zardari "Asif Ali Zardari").[[1]](#cite_note-Tribune-1)

Occasionally, he has also served as a television host, while before becoming an actor he was a lawyer.

## Early life and education

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Nauman_Ijaz&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Early life and education")]

Ijaz was born on 14 February 1965 and grew up in Icchra town, [Lahore](/wiki/Lahore "Lahore") into a [Punjabi](/wiki/Punjabi_Muslims "Punjabi Muslims") family.[[5]](#cite_note-Jang2019-5) His father was the manager of a cinema house in Lahore and Ijaz has an elder brother and a younger sister.[[5]](#cite_note-Jang2019-5)

Ijaz began his education at Cathedral High School in Lahore. Later, he attended the [Divisional Public School](/wiki/Divisional_Public_School_and_College "Divisional Public School and College"), [Model Town, Lahore](/wiki/Model_Town,_Lahore "Model Town, Lahore") and then completed his further education at [Forman Christian College](/wiki/Forman_Christian_College "Forman Christian College"). His parents wanted him to become a doctor, while he aspired to be a newscaster. However, inspired by his elder brother, he ultimately pursued a law degree from [Punjab University](/wiki/Punjab_University,_Lahore "Punjab University, Lahore").[[5]](#cite_note-Jang2019-5)[[6]](#cite_note-tv.com.pk-6)[[2]](#cite_note-awaz-2)

## Acting career

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Nauman_Ijaz&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Acting career")]

### Television

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Nauman_Ijaz&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Television")]

Ijaz began his acting career on [PTV](/wiki/Pakistan_Television_Corporation "Pakistan Television Corporation") in 1989, after being rejected in 1985 and then in 1987, with a short appearance under the direction of [Nusrat Thakur](/wiki/Nusrat_Thakur "Nusrat Thakur") in the drama *Aik Din*.[[4]](#cite_note-Tribune2014-4) His role lasted only 50 seconds.[[5]](#cite_note-Jang2019-5) He then did a TV serial on [PTV](/wiki/Pakistan_Television_Corporation "Pakistan Television Corporation") (Quetta Center).

He later appeared in many different roles, including negative roles in the dramas *[Rehaai](/wiki/Rehaai "Rehaai")* (2013) and *[Ullu Baraye Farokht Nahi](/wiki/Ullu_Baraye_Farokht_Nahi "Ullu Baraye Farokht Nahi")* (2013).

In 2014, he played a Pakistani cab-driver based in [Jackson Heights](/wiki/Jackson_Heights,_Queens "Jackson Heights, Queens") in [Mehreen Jabbar](/wiki/Mehreen_Jabbar "Mehreen Jabbar")'s directed *[Jackson Heights](/wiki/Jackson_Heights_(TV_series) "Jackson Heights (TV series)")*.[[7]](#cite_note-7) He received unanimous praise for his performance, with a reviewer from *[Dawn](/wiki/Dawn_(newspaper) "Dawn (newspaper)")* stating, "He was truly the linchpin, holding the interest level in Jackson Heights even when the pace was flagging."[[8]](#cite_note-8) From 2016-17, he appeared in titular role in *[Bhai](/wiki/Bhai_(TV_series) "Bhai (TV series)")* as Aslam alias Bhai, the troublemaker local councillor from the [Walled City of Lahore](/wiki/Walled_City_of_Lahore "Walled City of Lahore").[[9]](#cite_note-9) In 2017, he played the titular role of ruthless and influential politician in political-drama *[Khan](/wiki/Khan_(serial) "Khan (serial)")*.[[10]](#cite_note-10) The same year, he played a household molestor in [Kashif Nisar](/wiki/Kashif_Nisar "Kashif Nisar")'s directed *[Dar Si Jaati Hai Sila](/wiki/Dar_Si_Jaati_Hai_Sila "Dar Si Jaati Hai Sila")*, for which he received Best TV Actor - Critics' Choice at the [18th Lux Style Awards](/wiki/18th_Lux_Style_Awards "18th Lux Style Awards").[[11]](#cite_note-11)

Some of his other notable serials include *[Noorpur Ki Rani](/wiki/Noorpur_Ki_Rani "Noorpur Ki Rani")* (2009), *[Mera Saaein](/wiki/Mera_Saaein "Mera Saaein")* (2010), *[Durr-e-Shehwar](/wiki/Durr-e-Shehwar "Durr-e-Shehwar")* (2011), *[Badi Aapa](/wiki/Badi_Aapa "Badi Aapa")* (2012), *[Sang-e-Mar Mar](/wiki/Sang-e-Mar_Mar "Sang-e-Mar Mar")* (2016), *[O Rangreza](/wiki/O_Rangreza "O Rangreza")* (2017), *[Raqeeb Se](/wiki/Raqeeb_Se "Raqeeb Se")* (2021), *[Parizaad](/wiki/Parizaad "Parizaad")* (2021), and *[Sang-e-Mah](/wiki/Sang-e-Mah "Sang-e-Mah")* (2022).[[12]](#cite_note-TheNews2023-12)

### Cinema

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Nauman_Ijaz&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Cinema")]

He has appeared in the film *[Ramchand Pakistani](/wiki/Ramchand_Pakistani "Ramchand Pakistani")* (2008) where he romanced [Nandita Das](/wiki/Nandita_Das "Nandita Das").[[13]](#cite_note-13)

### Webseries

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Nauman_Ijaz&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: Webseries")]

Ijaz starred alongside [Saba Qamar](/wiki/Saba_Qamar "Saba Qamar") in the 2022 [Zindagi](/wiki/Zindagi_(TV_channel) "Zindagi (TV channel)") original webseries *[Mrs. & Mr. Shameem](/wiki/Mrs._%26_Mr._Shameem "Mrs. & Mr. Shameem")*, which received attention for its unconventional romantic storyline and premiered on [ZEE5](/wiki/ZEE5 "ZEE5") on 11 March 2022.[[14]](#cite_note-14)[[15]](#cite_note-15)

## Other work

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Nauman_Ijaz&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: Other work")]

### Legal career

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Nauman_Ijaz&action=edit&section=7 "Edit section: Legal career")]

Before becoming an actor, Ijaz initially began his professional journey as a lawyer, undertaking cases before family and civil courts in Lahore for several years before fully committing to the entertainment industry.[[16]](#cite_note-DailyPakistan20242-16)

### Hosting career

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Nauman_Ijaz&action=edit&section=8 "Edit section: Hosting career")]

In the early 2010s, he hosted a TV comedy show called *[Mazaaq Raat](/wiki/Mazaaq_Raat "Mazaaq Raat")* on [Dunya News](/wiki/Dunya_News "Dunya News"). Earlier, he had hosted a comedy show on [PTV Home](/wiki/PTV_Home "PTV Home").[[6]](#cite_note-tv.com.pk-6) Later, he also hosted a prime time talk show on Neo News HD titled *G Sarkar*.[[6]](#cite_note-tv.com.pk-6)

## Personal life

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Nauman_Ijaz&action=edit&section=9 "Edit section: Personal life")]

Ijaz tied the knot with Rabia in the 1990s. In an interview, he shared that he first met Rabia at a college function. Initially, she acted reserved and asked him to keep his distance, but he persisted. During a charity event for [Shaukat Khanum Hospital](/wiki/Shaukat_Khanum_Hospital "Shaukat Khanum Hospital"), he proposed to her, asking if she would marry him. Rabia asked him to talk to her parents, and he decided to do so. The couple has three sons, including actor [Zaviyar Nauman Ijaz](/wiki/Zaviyar_Nauman_Ijaz "Zaviyar Nauman Ijaz").[[5]](#cite_note-Jang2019-5)
